hero.title: Site na mkpa maka nnweta na repo ọha na eze
hero.lead: IATF na-enyere ndị otu aka, ndị otu, na ndị mmadụ aka ịgbanwe ezigbo mkpa nnweta n'ime ọrụ ọha na eze mepere emepe.
support: A na-ebipụta ọrụ ndị a nabatara na nzukọ IATF GitHub n'okpuru akwụkwọ ikike copyleft ma mepụtara n'ihu ọha site n'aka onye injinia nwere ọrụ.

header.title: Ụzọ dị mfe ọha na eze maka ngwanrọ nwere ike ịnweta

paragraphs: Site na mpempe akwụkwọ, onye ọ bụla nwere ike itinye nsogbu nnweta na IATF. Ọ bụrụ na ndị otu nwere ike iwere ya, a na-emeghe ebe nchekwa GitHub ọha na eze maka ọrụ ahụ.
Ọrụ ọ bụla a nabatara nwere ebe ọha na eze doro anya maka koodu, mbipụta, akwụkwọ, na ntọhapụ, yana mmepe nke onye injinia nwere ọrụ na-eduzi na-emeghe.

terms.definition: Ọrụ kwesịrị ekwesị na ime ihe bara uru

header.title: Otú o si arụ ọrụ
header.intro: Ihe nlereanya ahụ na-anọgide na-adị obere ka ụzọ ọha na eze wee dị mfe ịgbaso.

steps.title: A na-arịọ arịrịọ
paragraphs: Otu mkpakọrịta, otu, ma ọ bụ onye ọ bụla nwere ike itinye akwụkwọ arịrịọ dabere na ezigbo mkpa nnweta.
Arịrịọ nwere ike ịmalite site na ebe nrụọrụ weebụ, site na email na contact@iatf.cc, ma ọ bụ site na Discord.

steps.title: IATF na-enyocha ya
paragraphs: Anyị na-enyocha ma ọrụ ahụ ò kwekọrọ n'ihe e bu n'obi nye ya, ma ọ̀ ga-ekwe omume, nakwa ma ò so n'ọrụ a na-arụ n'ebe ọha na eze ga-ahụ ya.

steps.title: A na-emepụta ebe nchekwa ọha na eze
paragraphs: Ọ bụrụ na a nabatara ọrụ, a na-ebipụta ya na nzukọ IATF GitHub n'okpuru ikikere copyleft.
Ebe nchekwa ahụ na-aghọ ebe obibi ọha na eze nke koodu, mbipụta, akwụkwọ, na ntọhapụ.

steps.title: Onye injinia nwere ibu ọrụ na-eduzi ọrụ ahụ
paragraphs: A na-ekenye onye injinia nwere ọrụ na ebe nchekwa ọrụ na mmepe na-eme n'ihu ọha.

header.title: Na-agagharị na-arụ ọrụ ugbu a ma ọ bụ na-amalite a kpọmkwem oru ngo

paragraphs: Jiri ndekọ ahụ iji hụ ihe ndị ọha na eze nwere, ma ọ bụ malite ntinye ma ọ bụrụ na nsogbu nnweta doro anya ga-aghọ ọrụ.
